task_completion.description: Verify the correct item is added to the transaction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The item 'Vintage Table Lamp' or item code 'V-LAMP' is visible in the active transaction or cart list.
The tax amount on the order summary is $0.00, or there is a clear 'Exempt' status applied to the item/transaction.

task_completion.description: Verify the price was overridden for this transaction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The unit price or line total for the Vintage Table Lamp in the cart is explicitly shown as $120.00 (overriding the standard $150.00).

task_completion.description: Verify the required note was added to the transaction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A transaction note, comment, or memo field displays the exact text: 'Damaged cosmetic scratch'.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment was processed as Cash for the correct amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A payment confirmation, receipt, or completed sale screen shows a 'Cash' payment of $120.00.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Copper Point of Sale graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Copper POS application being used, not a terminal, script, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not permanently alter the master inventory price.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the agent editing the product catalog/database to change the master price of V-LAMP to $120.00. The price change must only appear in the transaction screen.
The screenshots show a final receipt, success message, or a cleared cart after payment, rather than just filled-out fields that were never submitted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Item Code: V-LAMP. Item Description: Vintage Table Lamp. Master Price: $150.00 (must remain unchanged in inventory). Sale Price: $120.00 (override for this transaction only). Note Text: 'Damaged cosmetic scratch'. Payment Method: Cash.
